title: Workflow
description: Browse workflows that can be associated with projects and see current project usage.

createPage.title: Create workflow
createPage.description: Add the workflow basics and design the flow that projects can reuse later.
createPage.basicInfoDescription: Manage the workflow name and description without taking space from the flow designer.
createPage.name: Name
createPage.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe where this workflow applies and what it handles.
createPage.designDescription: Start with entry and completion nodes. Approval, automation, and notification nodes can be expanded later.
createPage.basicInfoRequired: Please complete the workflow name and description first

detail.title: Workflow detail
detail.description: Review workflow information and adjust the flow when you have permission.

emptyWorkflows.title: No workflows yet
emptyWorkflows.description: After workflows are created, they can be associated with projects and reused.

emptySearch.title: No workflows found
emptySearch.description: No workflows match the current keyword.
